svg.title: GenAI model families overview
svg.desc: A structural overview of the major generative AI model families: language models, image models, audio models, video models, and multimodal models, with example systems for each.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do large language models work?')
sendPrompt('How do image generation models work?')
sendPrompt('How do audio and music generation models work?')
sendPrompt('How do video generation models work?')
sendPrompt('What are code and reasoning models in AI?')

g.text: Scale: ~50 major foundation models · ~500K+ fine-tuned variants on Hugging Face
New releases weekly — Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Meta, Mistral, xAI, Cohere, 01.ai...
